title: Steam Rex deals 2x Atk damage after opponent Lightning

card.rawText: This creature is unaffected by creature effects and magic cards. If your opponent plays a Lightning card, this creature inflicts 2x Atk damage the turn it was used.

plan.title: Steam Rex deals 2x Atk damage after opponent Lightning
plan.summary: Have the opponent use a Lightning card, then battle with Steam Rex and verify 2x attack damage for that turn.

notes: Place Steam Rex on player_1 field as primary.
Opponent uses a Lightning card this turn.

steps: Battle with Steam Rex and verify 2x Atk damage.
